column1: # Test Cases: FR-04 AI Assistant Integration

column3: Test flow
column5: Expected Result

column1: Precondition: System running stably. User logged in and Workspace opened.

column3: Open chat panel and resize browser window.
column5: Panel resizes smoothly without overlapping the canvas.

column3: Submit a valid prompt and observe UI.
column5: A loading spinner or typing indicator appears clearly while waiting for the AI response.

column3: Paste a >5000 chars string into the prompt textarea.
column5: Browser native `maxlength` prevents pasting beyond the limit warning the user.

column3: Type `<script>alert(1)</script>` in chat box.
column5: Input is safely bound by React no dangerous alert scripts trigger live on UI.

column3: Leave prompt empty and check Send button.
column5: Send button is disabled/greyed out.

column3: Type prompt and press Enter vs Shift+Enter.
column5: Enter submits the prompt; Shift+Enter creates a new line without submitting.

column3: Enter prompt to create User and Post tables with 1-N relation.
column5: Chatbot returns valid JSON schema. Canvas renders 2 nodes and 1 connecting edge successfully.

column3: Prompt to add 'email' column to existing User table.
column5: Chatbot returns updated JSON for User table. Canvas immediately updates in real-time.

column3: Ask AI about the weather today.
column5: AI detects out-of-domain prompt and replies with a localized fallback message smoothly.

column3: Send a highly confusing prompt forcing AI to return broken JSON syntax.
column4: Prompt: "Create table User then stop at } ]"
column5: Frontend/Backend catches the JSON.parse error. System shows Toast 'AI returned invalid format' without crashing UI.
column8: Frontend lacks Try/Catch block; UI crashes to whitespace when JSON is malformed.

column3: Submit empty prompt via intercepted API req.
column5: Backend API returns HTTP 400 Bad Request securely without calling Kaggle API.

column3: Submit 1-character prompt.
column5: Passes validation, AI responds normally (e.g., 'I dont understand') without causing errors.

column3: Submit a massive string intentionally bypassing FE limits.
column5: Backend truncates the prompt or rejects with HTTP 413 Payload Too Large. Proxy avoids memory overflow.
column8: Currently proxy forwards blindly risking timeout or Kaggle 504 Gateway errors.

column3: Delay Kaggle API response > 30 seconds.
column5: Proxy safely triggers timeout and informs User 'AI is busy' instead of endless loading.

column1: # Test Cases: FR-02 Diagram Workspace Management

column3: Test flow
column5: Expected Result

column1: Precondition: User logged in and diagram workspace loaded natively.

column3: Drag and drop a node pan canvas zoom in/out.
column5: Canvas responds smoothly > 30 FPS without visual tearing.

column3: Open the Version History panel.
column5: Snapshots list is formatted clearly with timestamps and user details.

column3: Rename a table node to > 255 characters.
column5: UI truncates input or displays immediate 'Max length exceeded' tooltip.

column3: Rename a column to include foreign emojis/symbols.
column5: Characters are rendered correctly in React Flow without garbled text.

column3: Check Save button right after loading project.
column5: Button is disabled since no unsaved changes exist.

column3: Click Rollback snapshot button.
column5: Triggers a Confirm Dialog 'Unsaved changes will be lost' before proceeding.

column3: Add a node and click Save.
column5: API sends payload safely. Server responds HTTP 200 OK. Database visualizer schema is updated.

column3: Double click Save button rapidly without any canvas edit.
column5: Backend checksum evaluates equality blocks redundant Update DB call or returns 'Already up-to-date'.
column8: Double click dispatches two heavy UPDATE queries to MySQL. Lacking optimization.

column3: Rename column to JS script then bypass FE to Save.
column5: Backend Spring Security encodes the payload securely before writing to MySQL saving DB from injection.

column3: Copy paste 1000 nodes and Save over network.
column5: API handles the large JSON blob (approx 5MB) securely without crashing. HTTP 201/200.

column3: Select a snapshot from 10 mins ago and apply.
column5: Current canvas is completely cleared and restored identically to the snapshot's state.

column3: Manually trigger rollback API with fake ID.
column5: Backend returns HTTP 404 Not Found safely. Canvas is unbothered.

column3: Open 2 tabs. Tab 1 Saves. Tab 2 later Saves.
column5: Backend returns HTTP 409 Conflict. Prompts Tab 2 'Data modified by someone else'.
column8: Lacks Optimistic Locking. Tab 2 silently overwrites Tab 1's progress.

column3: Make continuous changes for over 10 minutes.
column5: System automatically generates a background save/snapshot without disturbing the user.
